betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6World Manipulation: The Builder§f

§aDeploy the ultimate tool for automated building, quarrying, pumping, and voiding!§f

The RFTools §bBuilder§f is a powerful machine capable of placing blocks, digging massive quarries, moving entities, and pumping liquids over huge areas.

§6Builder Specifications§f:
§b• RF Buffer§f: Stores up to §e1,000,000 RF§f, receiving §e20,000 RF/tick§f.
§b• Shape Bounds§f: Can operate on shapes up to §e512×512×512 blocks§f with offsets up to §e260 blocks§f.
§b• Inventory Support§f: Place an inventory (like a chest or crate) directly above or below the Builder to supply blocks (for building) or receive harvested blocks (for quarrying).

§6Energy Costs per Operation§f:
Every action the Builder executes consumes power from its buffer:
§b• Building Blocks§f: §e500 RF§f per block placed.
§b• Pumping Liquids§f: §e300 RF§f per block pumped.
§b• Quarrying Blocks§f: §e300 RF§f base per block mined (scales upwards based on block hardness).
§b• Moving Entities§f: §e5,000 RF§f per mob/animal moved.
§b• Teleporting Players§f: §e40,000 RF§f per player moved.
§b• Skipped Blocks§f: §e50 RF§f per block skipped (useful when filtering out dirt/gravel).

§6Quarry Shape Cards & Multipliers§f:
By inserting different §bQuarry Shape Cards§f, you modify how blocks are mined and how much power is consumed:
§b• Clearing Quarry Card§f: Mines blocks and leaves a void. §a0.5× energy multiplier§f (cheaper).
§b• Normal Quarry Card§f: Mines blocks and replaces them with Dirt. Standard §e1.0×§f cost.
§b• Fortune Quarry Card§f: Applies Fortune to mined ores. §c2.0× energy multiplier§f.
§b• Silk Quarry Card§f: Applies Silk Touch to mined blocks. §c3.0× energy multiplier§f.
